params_used.custom_text: // This SRAM cell has a data input (D), a data output (Q), a write disable signal (WD), a read disable signal (RD), and a clock signal (CLK). When WD is low, the input data D should be written into the SRAM cell. When RD is low, the data stored in the SRAM cell should be output to Q on the falling edge of the clock.
